info.title: 3D Print Sales API
info.description: REST API for managing a 3D printing business. Tracks materials, rates, customers, and print jobs with automatic cost calculation and profit analysis. All costs are computed server-side using configurable business settings.

post.description: Validates email and password, returns a JWT access token.

get.description: Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user.

put.description: Change the current user's password. Requires the current password for verification.

post.description: Create a new user account. Only administrators can create accounts.

get.description: Returns all user accounts. Only administrators can view the user list.

schema.title: Response List Users Api V1 Auth Users Get

get.description: Retrieve a single user account.

put.description: Update a user's profile, role, or active status. Admins cannot deactivate themselves.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a user by setting is_active=false. Admins cannot deactivate themselves.

schema.title: Response List Vendors Api V1 Accounting Vendors Get

get.description: Returns paginated cameras with optional filtering.

parameters.name: search

get.description: Proxies a single MJPEG frame from go2rtc for health checking and CORS-free fallback.

get.description: Admin-only. Returns every business and AI configuration setting, including provider configuration records.

schema.title: Response List Settings Api V1 Settings Get

get.description: Admin-only. Retrieve a single configuration setting by its unique key.

put.description: Admin-only. Update the value of an existing configuration setting.
Admin-only. Update multiple settings in a single request. Keys that don't exist are silently skipped.

schema.title: Response Bulk Update Settings Api V1 Settings Bulk Put

get.description: Returns filament materials with optional filtering by active status and search by name/brand. Supports pagination.

schema.title: Response List Materials Api V1 Materials Get

post.description: Add a new filament material. Cost per gram is automatically calculated from spool price and net usable grams.

get.description: Retrieve a single filament material including its calculated cost per gram.

put.description: Update one or more fields of a material. Cost per gram is recalculated if price or usable weight changes.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a material by setting active=false. Historical job data referencing this material is preserved.

schema.title: Response List Material Receipts Api V1 Materials  Material Id  Receipts Get

post.summary: #230: Resolve loaded filament against catalog; create review-needed entry on miss

get.description: Returns purchased/shop supplies with optional active, category, and text filtering.

parameters.name: search

schema.description: Search by name, SKU, category, or supplier
schema.title: Search

parameters.description: Search by name, SKU, category, or supplier

get.description: Returns business rates (labor, machine, overhead) with optional filtering by active status. Supports pagination.

get.description: Retrieve a single business rate.

put.description: Update one or more fields of a business rate.

get.description: Returns customers with job counts. Supports search by name/email and pagination.

post.description: Add a new customer record. Customers can be linked to jobs for tracking.

get.description: Retrieve a single customer with their total job count.

put.description: Update one or more fields of a customer record.

delete.description: Permanently delete a customer record. Jobs linked to this customer will retain the customer_name field.

parameters.name: search

schema.description: Search by printer name, slug, model, or location
schema.title: Search

parameters.description: Search by printer name, slug, model, or location

post.description: Create a new tracked printer resource.

get.description: Retrieve a single printer record.

put.description: Update one or more fields of a printer.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a printer by setting is_active=false.

post.description: Force a live provider refresh for a configured printer.
Tests connectivity to the configured monitoring provider without changing saved live state.

get.description: Fetches the active Moonraker print thumbnail through the backend to avoid frontend CORS and path encoding issues.
Returns paginated product catalog with filtering by active status, material, stock level, and search.

parameters.name: search

schema.description: Search by name, SKU, or UPC
schema.title: Search

parameters.description: Search by name, SKU, or UPC

post.description: Create a new product in the catalog. SKU is auto-generated in format PRD-{MATERIAL}-{NNNN}.

post.summary: Generate a unique internal UPC-A barcode
post.description: Returns a unique 12-digit UPC-A value from the app's internal-use `04` namespace. The value includes a valid UPC-A check digit and is intended for in-store/product-studio barcode workflows, not manufacturer-issued GS1 retail UPC assignment.

get.description: Retrieve a single product with its inventory details.

put.description: Update one or more fields of a product.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a product by setting is_active=false.

get.summary: Get a product bill of materials
get.description: Returns BOM component rows with estimated cost, stock readiness, and buildable quantity.

put.summary: Replace a product bill of materials
put.description: Replaces all BOM rows for a product. Editing the BOM does not consume inventory or change product unit cost.

get.description: Returns current stock blockers and buildable quantity for a product BOM.

get.summary: Generate a printable barcode for a product
get.description: Returns a PNG-encoded barcode or QR code for the given product. `format=code128` (default) encodes the product SKU; `format=upc` encodes the UPC-A value and requires the product to have a 12-digit UPC; `format=qr` encodes either the UPC/SKU or the product URL when `url=1` is set.

parameters.name: url

schema.description: When format=qr, encode the public product URL instead of UPC/SKU.
schema.title: Url

parameters.description: When format=qr, encode the public product URL instead of UPC/SKU.

schema.title: Response Convert Quote To Job Api V1 Quotes  Quote Id  Convert To Job Post

post.summary: #263 P2: Cron entry — generate late-fee invoices for overdue receivables

schema.description: Search by product name or SKU
schema.title: Search

parameters.description: Search by product name or SKU

post.description: Manually adjust inventory stock. Use positive quantity to add, negative to remove.
Compare counted stock to current stock and create the required variance adjustment through the existing audit/approval flow.

schema.title: Search

parameters.description: Search by sale number or customer name

post.description: Create a sale with line items. Platform fees are auto-computed from channel. Inventory is deducted for product items.

get.description: Aggregated sales metrics: revenue, units, AOV, refund rate, by-channel breakdown.
Retrieve a sale with its line items.

put.description: Update sale details (not line items). Status changes to 'refunded' restore inventory.

post.description: Mark a sale as refunded and restore inventory.

get.description: Returns a 4x6 browser-printable HTML shipping label for workstation-local printing.

post.description: Records operator-confirmed shipping label printing after the workstation successfully prints the label.

post.summary: Resolve a barcode scan for POS
post.description: Resolves an exact UPC/barcode match into a sellable active product for keyboard-wedge POS scanners. Returns a conflict for duplicates, inactive products, or out-of-stock products.
Creates a point-of-sale checkout using the standard sales tables and inventory path. POS sales are identified by the dedicated POS sales channel and stored as normal sales.

schema.title: Response List Settlements Api V1 Settlements Get

get.description: Stock levels with valuation, material usage, and turnover rates.
Download stock levels as a CSV file.
Sales over time, top products, and channel breakdown.
Download sales period data as a CSV file.
Combined P&L from production jobs and sales.
Download P&L period data as a CSV file.

Trial balance — debit + credit columns at a point in time
Receipts & Payments Summary — categorized cash movements grouped by GL account

get.description: Returns aggregated business metrics: total jobs, pieces, revenue, costs, profit, average margin, and top material. Supports date range filtering.
Returns daily revenue totals for charting. Supports date range filtering.

schema.title: Response Revenue Chart Api V1 Dashboard Charts Revenue Get

get.description: Returns job counts per material for pie/bar charts. Supports date range filtering.

schema.title: Response Material Usage Chart Api V1 Dashboard Charts Materials Get

get.description: Returns profit margin percentage per job for trend analysis. Supports date range filtering.

schema.title: Response Profit Margin Chart Api V1 Dashboard Charts Profit Margins Get

get.description: Returns finance-focused dashboard widgets for cash, receivables, payables, inventory, tax, and payouts in transit.
Returns the selected LLM provider, active model, and whether the provider is configured for read-only insights.

post.description: Uses the configured LLM provider to generate a read-only operational summary grounded in app data.

schema.title: Response List Tax Profiles Api V1 Tax Profiles Get
Response List Tax Remittances Api V1 Tax Remittances Get

get.summary: Per-component tax breakdown for compound profiles (#329 P2)
get.description:
For each tax profile, sum the period's sale subtotals (taxable base)
and decompose across components. Useful for compound profiles like
QC's GST+QST where remittance forms ask for each component separately.

parameters.name: profile_id

schema.description: Filter to one profile; otherwise all active
schema.title: Profile Id

parameters.description: Filter to one profile; otherwise all active

post.summary: Compute tax breakdown for a subtotal against a profile (#258 Phase 2)
post.description:
Returns one row per layer for compound profiles, one for single-rate.
Each row carries `component_name`, `base`, `rate`, `amount`,
`account_id`, and `is_reverse_charge`. Operators (and future invoice
creation flows) can use this to preview compound + reverse-charge
treatment before posting.

get.summary: List email send history for an invoice

get.summary: List bank-typed accounts with running balance

patch.summary: Flag or unflag a GL account as a bank account
Include or exclude a journal line in the reconciliation

post.summary: Finalize a reconciliation (refuses if book != statement)

schema.title: Response List Assets Api V1 Fixed Assets Get

delete.summary: Delete a fixed asset (only if no entries and not disposed)

post.summary: #325 P2: cron-friendly — post depreciation through the most recent completed month
post.description:
No-arg cron entry point. Posts depreciation through the last day of
the previous calendar month for every active asset that has any
catch-up entries due. Idempotent: re-running on the same day is a
no-op since `post_depreciation` skips already-posted periods.

post.summary: #325 P2: bulk-register fixed assets from a CSV upload
post.description:
CSV columns: name, acquired_on, acquisition_cost, useful_life_months
[, salvage_value, depreciation_method, declining_balance_rate,
   asset_tag, description, notes, asset_account_code,
   accumulated_depreciation_account_code, depreciation_expense_account_code]

Account codes resolve to IDs server-side. Defaults: 1700 / 1750 / 6700.
Returns one entry per row with `asset_id` or `error`.

post.summary: Post depreciation through a period for selected (or all active) assets
Dispose a fixed asset (sale or write-off)

schema.title: Response List Locations Api V1 Inventory Locations Get

delete.summary: Delete a location (only if no transfers reference it)

schema.title: Response List Transfers Api V1 Inventory Transfers Get

post.summary: Cancel a pending or in-transit transfer

get.summary: #318 P2: per-location product stock derived from completed transfers
get.description:
Returns net qty of each product currently sitting at this location,
computed from completed transfers (incoming - outgoing). Locations with
`kind=internal` typically also receive opening stock via the operator's
starting balance flow; the snapshot reflects only what's been moved.

For Phase 2-deeper, replace with a real per-location SoT.

get.summary: #318 P2: Get the default sale fulfillment location

put.summary: #318 P2: Set or clear the default sale fulfillment location

get.summary: #318 P2: per-product on-hand at this location from the SoT
get.description:
Returns the per-(product, location) source-of-truth on-hand,
plus the in-transit qty arriving from `in_transit` transfers. The
snapshot endpoint above derives from completed transfers only and
is retained for back-compat; this endpoint is the authoritative
read.

schema.title: Response Location Product Stock Api V1 Inventory Locations  Location Id  Product Stock Get

put.summary: #318 P2: set the prevent-negative-stock toggle (hard-block sales when on)

schema.title: Response List Rjes Api V1 Accounting Recurring Journal Entries Get

get.summary: List open Suspense (1900) journal lines for reclassification

post.summary: Admin one-shot: post opening balances JE balanced against OBE (3300)
#330 P2: Post opening balances from a CSV (account_code,amount[,as_of])
post.description:
Accepts a CSV with header row `account_code,amount` (and optional
`as_of` column to override the request param). Resolves account codes to
IDs server-side, then forwards to the same posting service as the JSON
endpoint, so the JE shape matches.

post.summary: #330 P2: Reclassify a Suspense (1900) line by posting an offsetting JE
post.description:
Closes out a Suspense line by posting a balanced JE: offset the
suspense leg and post the same amount to the chosen target account.
Original line stays put for audit; this is additive.

values aren't silently dropped. Use the dedicated hard-delete endpoint
when you really mean it.

tags.name: Settings
tags.description: Business configuration: currency, margins, fees, electricity costs, and more.

tags.name: Materials
tags.description: Filament material inventory (PLA, PETG, TPU, etc.) with cost-per-gram calculation.

tags.name: Rates
tags.description: Business rates for labor, machine wear, and overhead percentages.

tags.name: Customers
tags.description: Customer records linked to print jobs for order tracking.

tags.name: Jobs
tags.description: Print jobs with automatic cost calculation, pricing, and profit analysis.

tags.name: Printers
tags.description: Tracked printer resources for production-floor operations and monitoring.

tags.name: Products
tags.description: Product catalog with SKU tracking, inventory levels, and pricing.

tags.name: Inventory
tags.description: Inventory transactions, stock adjustments, and low-stock alerts.

tags.name: Sales
tags.description: Sales tracking with line items, channels, fees, refunds, and revenue metrics.

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: Inventory, sales, and P&L reports with CSV export.

tags.name: Dashboard
tags.description: Aggregated business metrics and chart data for the admin dashboard.
